violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Can opener not properly maintained needs routine cleaning. Splash area of small mixer noted in need of cleaning.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Wall in ware-washing area noted with holes need repair. Ceiling in main kitchen and in lower level dry-storage noted in need of repair. Piping and area around cooling units inside walkin cooler noted rusting noted in need of repair.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food bin (flour?) noted not properly labeled.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided. **Quat = 200 to 400 ppm (Chlorine = 50 to 100 ppm)
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some light covers noted in need of cleaning. Some ceiling and wall areas in kitchen noted not in good repair. (also repair any water leaks)
